# CONSOLIDATION PROMPT FOR DOCUMENTATION-ENGINEER

**From:** `/Users/bencrowe/Development/01-Knowledge-Base/Claude Skills & Agent Guide/Claude agents/documentation-engineer.md`

**Task:** Merge specific technical sections from Systems Guide into MASTER-PRD to create unified Systems Plan document

---

## SOURCE FILES

**Primary Document (Keep as-is):**
- `/Users/bencrowe/Development/APR-Dashboard-v3/.APR-System-Roadmap/MASTER-PRD.md`

**Secondary Document (Extract from):**
- `/Users/bencrowe/Development/APR-Dashboard-v3/.APR-System-Roadmap/APR-Systems Guide-V3.md`

---

## CONSOLIDATION INSTRUCTIONS

### 1. SQL Schema → New Appendix Section
**From Systems Guide:** Complete SQL CREATE TABLE statements (all tables with constraints, indexes, relationships)  
**Add to MASTER-PRD:** New Appendix section "Complete Database Schema - SQL"  
**Format:** Runnable SQL code blocks with comments  
**Location in MASTER-PRD:** After current Appendix E, create Appendix F

---

### 2. Field Mapping Tables → Technical Reference Section
**From Systems Guide:** Section-by-section field mapping tables (Sections 1-5)  
**Add to MASTER-PRD:** Expand "Technical Configurations" section with detailed field tables  
**Format:** Markdown tables showing:
- Dashboard Field Name
- Valcre API Field Name  
- Section Location
- Data Type
- Required/Optional
- Transformation Rules (if any)

**Integrate into:** MASTER-PRD → "Technical Configurations" section

---

### 3. Known Issues List → Replace Current Section
**From Systems Guide:** 7 prioritized issues with color indicators (🔴 CRITICAL | 🟡 HIGH | 🟢 MEDIUM | ⚪ LOW)  
**Replace in MASTER-PRD:** Current "Known Issues & Blockers" section  
**Format:** Issues should include:
- Priority indicator
- Issue title
- Description
- Impact
- Status/Workaround if available

---

### 4. Valcre API Examples → Integration Section
**From Systems Guide:** Complete POST request JSON, complete PATCH request JSON (with OData warning), entity creation order  
**Add to MASTER-PRD:** "Technical Configurations" → "Valcre API Integration" subsection  
**Format:** Code blocks with:
- Request method (POST/PATCH)
- Endpoint URL
- Complete JSON payload with sample values
- Response format
- Error handling notes
- Entity creation order (numbered steps)

---

## STYLE & FORMAT GUIDELINES

**Maintain consistency with existing MASTER-PRD:**
- Keep markdown formatting style (headings, lists, emphasis)
- Use same code block formatting (```json, ```sql, etc.)
- Match table formatting
- Keep technical rationale sections to 2 paragraphs max
- Link between sections where appropriate

**Before/After Structure:**
- **Before:** MASTER-PRD is 57.91 KB, Systems Guide is 60.37 KB (separate documents)
- **After:** MASTER-PRD expanded to ~95 KB (single unified Systems Plan document), Systems Guide becomes archive reference

---

## VALIDATION CHECKLIST

After consolidation, verify:
- [ ] All SQL CREATE statements are syntactically correct
- [ ] Field mapping tables match Systems Guide exactly (no data loss)
- [ ] All 7 known issues are present with correct priority levels
- [ ] Valcre API examples are complete and valid JSON
- [ ] No duplicate information (remove redundancy from MASTER-PRD if present)
- [ ] All internal links still work
- [ ] Document structure is logical (no orphaned sections)
- [ ] Version/last-modified date updated
- [ ] File is readable and scannable (test table of contents)

---

## DELIVERABLE

**Output File:** `/Users/bencrowe/Development/APR-Dashboard-v3/.APR-System-Roadmap/MASTER-PRD.md` (updated)

**What to return to Claude Desktop:**
1. Updated MASTER-PRD file
2. Brief summary of changes (what was added where)
3. Any conflicts or decisions made during consolidation
4. Recommendations for next steps

---

## CRITICAL NOTES

- **Don't delete Systems Guide** - Keep as archive/reference library
- **No lossy merges** - All data from Systems Guide must be accurately represented
- **Consolidate, don't duplicate** - If MASTER-PRD already has info, use Systems Guide version as authoritative if more complete
- **Update metadata** - Change version number and "Last Updated" date in MASTER-PRD
- **Maintain readability** - This document is for both executives (overview) and developers (technical details)

---

## OUTCOME

Single unified **Systems Plan** document (currently called MASTER-PRD) that contains:
- Strategic vision and roadmap (from MASTER-PRD)
- Complete technical specifications (from Systems Guide)
- Implementation timeline and decisions (from MASTER-PRD)
- Ready for new component documentation to be added (Calculator, Report Builder, Ether)
